fix_spotlight_obo.name: Fix Spotlights
fix_spotlight_obo.notes: Off-by-one introduced in NT. InputManager entry loops use 'count+1' instead of 'count'. An extra zeroed entry (type=keyboard, key=VK_NONE, target=RED_LAMP_L) is processed every frame. Appears to be some sort of light testing functionality left over from debug builds.
fix_spotlight_obo.description: Fixes the issues with the red spotlight getting stuck.

disable_exit_after_credit.name: Disable Exit After Credit
disable_exit_after_credit.notes: Remember 1st was modified for the 6th TraX launcher: realMainGameLoop (VA 0x4217F0) runs ONE credit then sets g_processExitCode=261 and exits, signaling the launcher to switch back to 6th TraX. The original 1st TraX has a while(1) loop (attract->play->repeat). This patch restores that loop by replacing 'mov g_creditWasPlayed, 1' at 0x4218C1 with 'jmp short 0x421848' which jumps back to the timeGetTime + resetGameState + realAttractModeLoop sequence. The game now loops attract->credit->attract indefinitely. Exit via ESC/test button still works normally.
disable_exit_after_credit.description: Prevents the game from exiting after each credit. Returns to title screen instead of closing.

fix_modern_compat.name: Fix Windows XP+ Compatibility
fix_modern_compat.description: Fixes non relative paths, directsound, and file opening issues on modern Windows.

writes.notes: Stubs setupDisplayMode to return 1. Prevents ChangeDisplaySettingsExA from permanently changing desktop resolution to 640x480x16.

restore_opening.name: Restore Opening Video
restore_opening.description: Restores the unused Opening video sequence in the attract mode

writes.bytes: E8 7B 06 FE FF E8 26 2F FE FF C3

disable_explorer_launch.name: Disable Launching explorer.exe on Exit
disable_explorer_launch.description: Prevents the game from launching explorer.exe when it exits.

restore_boot_splash.name: Restore Boot Splash Screens
restore_boot_splash.notes: Three writes: (1) 0x46C59D redirects EZ2DJ__mainLoop's call to mainGameLoop through a code cave. (2) Cave at 0x488010 calls WarningDirector then CompanyLogoDirector before tail-jumping to mainGameLoop. Only runs once since EZ2DJ__mainLoop is called once by KApplication__run. (3) 0x46823C optimizes WarningDirector__update redundant register reloads and expands cmp imm8 to imm32, changing threshold from 90 frames (1.5s) to 300 frames (5s), matching 3rd TraX.
restore_boot_splash.description: Restores the Warning and Company Logo splash screens on boot.

writes.bytes: E8 4D 97 F7 FF E8 70 92 F7 FF 8B 4D FC E9 EA A1 F7 FF

restore_cd_advertisement.name: Restore CD Advertisement
restore_cd_advertisement.notes: Rewrites the attract mode v9==3 handler at 0x46B83F to insert a call to AdvertiseDirector before the demo and company logo. Replaces dead cmp/jnz/jmp sequence with the new call. Attract cycle becomes: Title -> CD Ad -> Demo -> CompanyLogo -> Title.
restore_cd_advertisement.description: Restores the CD advertisemen the attract cycle.

writes.bytes: E8 44 5C F9 FF 8B 4D FC E8 61 5F F9 FF 8B 4D FC E8 36 5A F9 FF EB A3 90 90

hide_credit_display.name: Hide Credit/Freeplay Display
hide_credit_display.notes: Sets ShowCredit visibility to 0 by patching push 1 -> push 0 before the setVisible call in the constructor. Must be super_early so the byte is patched before the game thread creates any ShowCredit instances.
hide_credit_display.description: Hides the Freeplay/Credits overlay from all screens.

event_mode_title.name: Event Mode Title Screen
event_mode_title.description: Checks the EventMode INI flag at runtime and loads eventmode.str instead of Title.str when enabled.

use_io_card_force.name: Force UseIOCard Enabled
use_io_card_force.description: Patches all UseIOCard checks to always proceed as if UseIOCard=1, regardless of INI value.

force_iocard.name: Force UseIOCard
force_iocard.description: Forces UseIOCard=1 regardless of INI setting.

scan_group.notes: Match the UseIOCard check followed by NOPped conditional jump: cmp [eax+4200F4h], 0 / 6x NOP / push -1 / push 1Bh / push 0 / push 0

writes.notes: Restore jz +0x1B2 (skip to ESC-only fallback when UseIOCard=0)

timer_freeze.name: Timer Freeze
timer_freeze.description: Freezes the countdown timer in mode and song select.

use_io_card_force.name: Force UseIOCard Enabled
use_io_card_force.description: Patches all UseIOCard checks to always proceed as if UseIOCard=1, regardless of INI value.

win10_fix.name: Win10 Fix
win10_fix.description: Fixes a compatibility issue that causes crashing on Windows 10.

timer_freeze.name: Timer Freeze
timer_freeze.description: Freezes the countdown timer in mode and song select.

hide_credit_display.name: Hide Credit/Freeplay Display
hide_credit_display.notes: Sets ShowCredit visibility to 0. Patches mov [esi+14h],1 -> mov [esi+14h],0 in the constructor.
hide_credit_display.description: Hides the Freeplay/Credits overlay from all screens.

timer_freeze.name: Timer Freeze
timer_freeze.description: Freezes the countdown timer in mode and song select.

timer_freeze_183.description: Freezes the countdown timer in mode and song select. for TT 1.83

timer_freeze.description: Freezes the countdown timer in mode and song select.

keyboard_fix.name: Fix Keyboard
keyboard_fix.description: Re-enables keyboard input that the game disables on startup.

timer_freeze.name: Timer Freeze
timer_freeze.description: Freezes the countdown timer in mode and song select.

force_60hz.name: Force 60Hz
force_60hz.description: Forces D3D9 to request 60Hz in fullscreen mode.

disable_exit_shutdown.name: Disable Shutdown/Reboot on Exit
disable_exit_shutdown.notes: NOPs ExitWindowsEx calls that would reboot/shutdown the PC when the game exits.
disable_exit_shutdown.description: Prevents the game from rebooting or shutting down the PC on exit.

card_strip.name: 'WGC' Mode
card_strip.description: Removes smart card requirement for accessing questmode and saving highscores. All songs and quests are unlocked.
